content.speakerText: Let me show you to the meeting room — your team's already here.
content.speakerTextCn: 我带您去会议室，您的团队已经到了。

options.text: Perfect! I'm glad they made it okay.
Can we reschedule? I'm running late.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的引导并表达了对团队已到的欣慰，符合专业礼貌的语境。其他选项要么与情境无关（如问洗手间），要么错误地表示需要联系团队（实际团队已到），或提出取消会议，与积极欢迎的语境冲突。

content.speakerText: We've got the projector set up and your agenda on the table.
content.speakerTextCn: 投影仪已经准备好了，您的议程也放在桌上。

options.text: That's so thoughtful — you've really thought of everything!

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了对对方细致准备的真诚赞美，符合增强客户体验的沟通目标。其他选项要么否定对方准备（自带投影仪），要么转移话题（问咖啡），或提出变更议程，与对方展示准备工作的积极语境不符。

content.speakerText: We're all set for your presentation. The chairs are arranged in a U-shape, and the refreshments are just outside.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的演示已全部准备就绪。椅子已摆成U形，茶点在门外。

options.text: This looks perfect — thank you for such a smooth setup.
I didn't ask for a U-shape. Can you change it?
Do you have any snacks left?
I think I'll skip the presentation.

content.explanation: 正确答案以积极、专业的方式认可了细致安排，符合职场引导场景的礼仪。其他选项表现出不满或不合时宜的请求，破坏了合作氛围，不符合客户体验导向的沟通原则。

content.template: Let me show you to the meeting room — your team's already here. Okay, let's ___.
content.hint: 这是对引导的简洁回应，常用在口语中表示立即行动
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：let's go（表示同意并立即行动）

content.template: We've got the projector set up and your agenda on the table. That's so ___ — you've really thought of everything!
content.hint: 用于赞美对方考虑周到，是职场中表达感激的高频词
content.knowledgePoint: 形容词搭配：thoughtful（周到的）用于赞美服务细节

content.template: I'll take you to the main conference room. Would you like me to ___ you a drink while you wait?
content.hint: 在引导过程中提供便利服务时的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：bring sb. sth.（为某人拿来某物）

content.speakerText: Let me show you to the meeting room — your team's already here.
content.speakerTextCn: 我带您去会议室，您的团队已经到了。
expectedAnswers: Perfect! I'm glad they made it okay.
Awesome, thanks! Is this the main conference room?
Okay, let's go — I'm eager to get started.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应了引导并确认了团队状态
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯，避免生硬或翻译腔
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'team', 'meeting room'

content.speakerText: We've got the projector set up and your agenda on the table.
content.speakerTextCn: 投影仪已经准备好了，您的议程也放在桌上。
expectedAnswers: That's so thoughtful — you've really thought of everything!
Great, thanks. Everything looks ready for the presentation.
Wow, you've done an amazing job preparing this!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了对准备工作的认可与感谢
语言准确性：是否正确使用了形容词和搭配（如 thoughtful, thought of everything）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的口语表达，避免机械复制
关键词覆盖：是否提及了 projector / agenda / ready 等关键词

content.speakerText: We're all set for your presentation. The chairs are arranged in a U-shape, and the refreshments are just outside.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的演示已全部准备就绪。椅子已摆成U形，茶点在门外。
expectedAnswers: This looks perfect — thank you for such a smooth setup.
That's very considerate! I really appreciate all the details.
Great! Could you also check if the microphones are working?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢并确认了环境准备情况
语言准确性：语法、时态和搭配是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了符合职场语境的礼貌表达
关键词覆盖：是否提及了 setup / chairs / refreshments / presentation
